// what we do

END-TO-END GAME QA SERVICES

From pre-production to live service — we cover every stage of quality assurance across all platforms and game types.

🎮
Functionality Testing

End-to-end functional validation of all game features — mechanics, UI flows, game logic, progression systems and edge case coverage.

✅
UAT — User Acceptance Testing

Full UAT coverage ensuring your game meets design intent, player expectations and stakeholder sign-off criteria before release.

🏆
Console & Platform Compliance

TRC/TCR certification testing for PlayStation, Xbox and Nintendo. App store compliance for iOS and Android — primary and secondary store checks included.

📊
Performance Testing

Server-side and client-side performance benchmarking — FPS stability, load times, memory profiling and network performance under simulated real-world conditions.

🔄
Regression Testing

Structured regression cycles ensuring every build update doesn't break existing functionality — critical for live service titles with continuous updates.

🌐
Online & Multiplayer Testing

Server stability, matchmaking, latency, session management and concurrent player load testing — end-to-end network QA for online titles.

📡
Telemetry & Live Ops QA

Validation of in-game analytics events and DNA events in real time — ensuring your live ops data is accurate and your game economy behaves as intended.

🖥️
Game Server Testing

Dedicated server validation — health checks, load testing, failover scenarios and backend stability under production traffic conditions.

📱
Mobile QA — iOS & Android

Platform-specific testing across device tiers — touch input, OS compatibility, performance profiles, store certification and in-app purchase validation.

// why respawn qa

QA EXPERTISE BUILT INSIDE AAA STUDIOS

Respawn QA isn't a testing factory. We're game industry veterans who have shipped real AAA titles under real production pressure — and built the QA processes that made those launches possible.

"We don't just find bugs. We build the infrastructure that stops them reaching your players."

Our founder spent 6 years at Ubisoft Singapore as QA Lead — building performance testing frameworks from zero, reducing build pipeline time by 61%, running QA across 5 international studios simultaneously, and shipping across console, PC and mobile.

That's the experience behind every engagement at Respawn QA.

🎯
Skull & Bones — Ubisoft Singapore

// market opportunity

WHY NOW IS THE RIGHT TIME

The gaming industry is growing faster than in-house QA teams can keep up. Studios need specialist partners — not generalist testers.

$280B
Global Games Market

The gaming industry surpassed $280B in 2024 — with mobile, console and PC all growing simultaneously. More games means more QA demand.

↑ 40%
Outsourced QA Growth

Studios are increasingly outsourcing QA to reduce headcount costs while maintaining quality. The specialist QA partner market is expanding rapidly.

SEA
Singapore as a Hub

Southeast Asia is home to major studios — Ubisoft, Garena, Sea Group, Razer. Singapore is uniquely positioned as a QA partner for the region's growing game development ecosystem.

// partnership opportunity

JOIN US AT THE GROUND FLOOR

Respawn QA is in its founding stage — and we're looking for the right partners to build it with us. Here's how you can be part of it.

01
Equity Partnership

Invest in Respawn QA and hold an equity stake in the company. As we grow our client base and revenue, your stake grows in value. Ideal for investors who believe in the gaming industry's trajectory.

Investment · Equity Stake
02
Co-Founding

Join as a co-founder and help shape the direction of the company — bringing your network, business expertise or capital to the table alongside our industry experience. Build something meaningful from day one.

Co-Founder · Active Role
03
Strategic Partner

Know studios or publishers who need QA services? Partner with us commercially — refer clients, open doors, and participate in the upside of every engagement you help bring in.

Revenue Share · Network
04
Advisory Role

Contribute your expertise in business, finance or the games industry as an advisor. Help us make better decisions at the critical early stage in exchange for equity or other arrangements.

Advisor · Equity Options

We're having early conversations — no hard ask, no pressure. If this resonates with you, let's talk.

// the founder

BUILT BY SOMEONE WHO'S BEEN IN THE ROOM

I'm Kousik Karthikeyan Dhanakkodi — founder of Respawn QA and the parent group Mantram. I've spent 16+ years in the games industry, most recently as QA Lead at Ubisoft Singapore where I shipped Skull & Bones and The Division Resurgence.

I've built QA processes from zero, managed globally distributed teams across 5 studios, reduced build pipelines by 61%, validated telemetry on live events and led compliance testing for Singapore store mandates.

Respawn QA is the natural next step — taking that expertise and making it available to studios that need it most: indie, mid-size and mobile-first teams who can't afford a full in-house QA lead but can't afford to ship without one.
